## WirePayload interface

The wire payload includes the payload of the event, and a [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) object to add more information to the event.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface WirePayload<PayloadType> 
```

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [eventPayload](./x-components.wirepayload.eventpayload.md) | PayloadType | The payload of the event, which must be of type [XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->. |
|  [metadata](./x-components.wirepayload.metadata.md) | [WireMetadata](./x-components.wiremetadata.md) | An object containing information about the emission of the event. |
